name: 15q23_HEXA_neighbouring_SD
description: HEXA (Tay-Sachs disease) at 15q23 is flanked by small (~5-15 kb at 93-96% identity) intra-chromosomal SDs and Alu repeats. The most common Ashkenazi Tay-Sachs allele is a 4-bp insertion, but rare large deletions (e.g. the 7.6 kb French-Canadian del) and intragenic NAHR events occur via these SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SDs flanking HEXA; intragenic Alu-Alu pairs at intron 7-8 drive the 7.6 kb deletion.
